name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-config

metadata.name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-config
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: Tencent Cloud Config SDK for Python

documentation:
# Tencent Cloud SDK for Python

Tencent Cloud Python Config SDK is the official software development kit, which allows Python developers to write software that makes use of Tencent Cloud services like CVM and CBS.
The SDK works on Python versions:

> - 2.7 and greater, including 3.x

## Quick Start

First, install the library:

```sh
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-common
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-config
```

or download source code from github and install:

```sh
$ git clone https://github.com/tencentcloud/tencentcloud-sdk-python.git
$ cd tencentcloud-sdk-python
$ python package.py --components common config
```

methods.name: tencentcloud.config.v20220802.models.Annotation.__init__
documentation:
> ```
> param _Configuration
>
> 资源当前实际配置。长度为0~256位字符，即资源不合规配置
> ```

注意：此字段可能返回 null，表示取不到有效值。
: ```
  type Configuration

  str

  param _DesiredValue

  资源期望配置。长度为0~256位字符，即资源合规配置
  ```

注意：此字段可能返回 null，表示取不到有效值。
: ```
  type DesiredValue

  str

  param _Operator

  资源当前配置和期望配置之间的比较运算符。长度为0~16位字符，自定义规则上报评估结果此字段可能为空

  type Operator

  str

  param _Property

  当前配置在资源属性结构体中的JSON路径。长度为0~256位字符，自定义规则上报评估结果此字段可能为空

  type Property

  str
  ```
